# arm3-coherence fixture (T019, S13)

This fixture proves **mutual coherence**: one generator run over one graph (`input/graph.json`, 3 nodes / 2 edges) produces three separate context products — the blast-radius diet (`input/context.md`), the receipts diet (`input/receipts.md`), and the type-signal diet (`input/typesignal.md`) — and all three must carry the **identical** shared-provenance header (T004), because `generation-id` is a pure function of the graph's content, not of which diet is being emitted. `cmd.sh` recomputes the canonical `generation-id` directly from `input/graph.json` via `provenance.sh` (never assumed, always recomputed), extracts each product's own `generation-id:` header field with the same `sed`/`grep` recipe SKILL.md documents, and asserts all three product ids are byte-identical **to each other and to the canonical id** — tying the check to the real graph, not merely to the three files agreeing among themselves, is exactly the S13 invariant a per-product golden (`arm3-products/`, T018) can prove for each file in isolation but can never catch drifting **between** files. The precomputed canonical id for this fixture's graph is `sha256:44a90c48cdb9ce84d527d4655720c762932232f8d62deca7541a5cf1c5957a9e` (per the T004 canonicalization recipe: parse JSON, drop `built_at_commit`, re-serialize with sorted keys/compact separators, SHA-256). `cmd.sh` calls `extensions/graphify/extension/scripts/provenance.sh`, an orchestrator-owned shared helper authored in a later wave (T020's neighborhood) — until it exists this fixture fails with "No such file or directory", the intended red-for-the-right-reason TDD state (see `extensions/graphify/test/run.sh`'s fixture-discovery convention), not a malformed fixture; once `provenance.sh` lands, this fixture goes green with no edits required.
